mapper.select:
SELECT C.아이디 AS counselorId, -- A.전담자_계정 대신 C.아이디 사용 (A는 NULL일 수 있음) C.이름 AS counselorName, C.지점 AS branch, ISNULL(SUM(종료참여자), 0) AS completedCount, ISNULL(SUM(전체취업자), 0) AS totalEmployment, ISNULL(SUM(알선취업), 0) AS referralEmployment, ISNULL(SUM([성과 인정 취업]), 0) AS approvedEmployment, ISNULL(SUM([성과 불인정 취업]), 0) AS nonApprovedEmployment, ISNULL(SUM(고용유지), 0) AS employmentRetention, ISNULL(SUM(나은일자리), 0) AS betterJobCount, ISNULL(SUM(IAP수립1달), 0) AS iapEstablishMonth, ISNULL(SUM(인센발생), 0) AS incentiveOccurred, ISNULL(SUM(인센미발생), 0) AS incentiveNotOccurred, -- 분모가 0일 경우 0을 반환하도록 처리 ROUND(CASE WHEN SUM(종료참여자) > 0 THEN SUM(전체취업자)*1.0/SUM(종료참여자) ELSE 0 END, 4) AS employmentRate, ROUND(CASE WHEN SUM(종료참여자) > 0 THEN SUM([성과 인정 취업])*1.0/SUM(종료참여자) ELSE 0 END, 4) AS evaluationEmploymentRate, ROUND(CASE WHEN SUM(종료참여자) > 0 THEN SUM(알선취업)*1.0/SUM(종료참여자) ELSE 0 END, 4) AS referralEmploymentRate, ROUND(CASE WHEN SUM(종료참여자) > 0 THEN SUM(나은일자리)*1.0/SUM(종료참여자) ELSE 0 END, 4) AS betterJobRate, ROUND(CASE WHEN SUM(종료참여자) > 0 THEN SUM(고용유지)*1.0/SUM(종료참여자) ELSE 0 END, 4) AS retentionRate, ROUND(CASE WHEN SUM(종료참여자) > 0 THEN SUM(인센발생)*1.0/SUM(종료참여자) ELSE 0 END, 4) AS incentiveOccurrenceRate FROM 평가실적 A RIGHT JOIN J_참여자관리_로그인정보 C ON A.전담자_계정 = C.아이디 AND 실제종료일 >= #{startDate} AND 실제종료일 <= #{endDate} WHERE
C.아이디 IN
#{userId}
GROUP BY C.아이디, C.지점, C.이름, C.조회순서 ORDER BY C.조회순서

SELECT A.이름 counselorName, A.아이디 UserID, ISNULL(C.유형1, 0) todayPersonnelOneType, ISNULL(C.유형2, 0) todayPersonnelTwoType, ISNULL(C.금일일반취업, 0) memberTodayEmployment, ISNULL(C.금일알선취업, 0) memberTodayPlacement, ISNULL(C.금주일반취업, 0) memberToWeekEmployment, ISNULL(C.금주알선취업, 0) memberToWeekPlacement, ISNULL(C.금월일반취업, 0) memberToMonthEmployment, ISNULL(C.금월알선취업, 0) memberToMonthPlacement, ISNULL(C.금년일반취업, 0) memberToYearEmployment, ISNULL(C.금년알선취업, 0) memberToYearPlacement, ISNULL(C.업무보고일, '1900-01-01') endUpdateStatus, A.일일업무일지발급여부 memberDailyWorkDiaryIssuance FROM J_참여자관리_로그인정보 A LEFT JOIN ( -- 아이디별 최신 업무보고 데이터만 추출 SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY 지점, 아이디 ORDER BY 업무보고일 DESC) as rn FROM J_참여자관리_일일업무보고 ) C ON A.지점 = C.지점 AND A.아이디 = C.아이디 AND C.rn = 1 WHERE A.지점=#{branch} ORDER BY A.조회순서
SELECT ISNULL(SUM(유형1), 0) branchType1, ISNULL(SUM(유형2), 0) branchType2 FROM J_참여자관리_일일업무보고 WHERE 지점 = #{branch} AND 업무보고일 = #{dailyUpdateStatusDate} GROUP BY 지점

update.foreach: IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM J_참여자관리_일일업무보고 WHERE 아이디 = #{userId} AND 업무보고일 = CONVERT(CHAR(10), #{dailyUpdateStatusDate}, 23) AND 지점 = #{branch}) BEGIN UPDATE J_참여자관리_일일업무보고 SET 유형1 = #{todayPersonnelOneTypes[${index}]}, 유형2 = #{todayPersonnelTwoTypes[${index}]}, 금일일반취업 = #{memberTodayEmployments[${index}]}, 금일알선취업 = #{memberTodayPlacements[${index}]}, 금주일반취업 = #{memberToWeekEmployments[${index}]}, 금주알선취업 = #{memberToWeekPlacements[${index}]}, 금월일반취업 = #{memberToMonthEmployments[${index}]}, 금월알선취업 = #{memberToMonthPlacements[${index}]}, 금년일반취업 = #{memberToYearEmployments[${index}]}, 금년알선취업 = #{memberToYearPlacements[${index}]}, 실적수정일 = getdate() WHERE 아이디 = #{userId} AND 업무보고일 = CONVERT(CHAR(10), #{dailyUpdateStatusDate}, 23) AND 지점 = #{branch} END ELSE BEGIN INSERT INTO J_참여자관리_일일업무보고 (지점, 아이디, 유형1, 유형2, 금일일반취업, 금일알선취업, 금주일반취업, 금주알선취업, 금월일반취업, 금월알선취업, 금년일반취업, 금년알선취업, 업무보고일) VALUES( #{branch}, #{userId}, #{todayPersonnelOneTypes[${index}]}, #{todayPersonnelTwoTypes[${index}]}, #{memberTodayEmployments[${index}]}, #{memberTodayPlacements[${index}]}, #{memberToWeekEmployments[${index}]}, #{memberToWeekPlacements[${index}]}, #{memberToMonthEmployments[${index}]}, #{memberToMonthPlacements[${index}]}, #{memberToYearEmployments[${index}]}, #{memberToYearPlacements[${index}]}, CONVERT(CHAR(10), #{dailyUpdateStatusDate}, 23) ); END;
